functional.description: Execute full stability and compliance validation sweep.
functional.rationale: To confirm that the restoration effort was 100% successful.
acceptance: npm run validate:agents and validate:structure both pass.

functional.description: Conduct manual spot-checks on imported assets.
functional.rationale: To ensure qualitative integrity beyond automated checks.
acceptance: Checklist of 5 random assets passes verification.

constraints.description: Zero warnings/errors acceptable for final sign-off.
constraints.impact: Establishes a high quality bar for the project.
